_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin Deficiency Induces Endothelial Cell Proliferation and Retinal Neovascularization.

_contextSnippet: Nf1flox/+;VEcre retinas exhibited increased neovascularization and vessel dropout, which closely resembled our observations in Nf1+/− animals
details: Nf1flox/+;VEcre retinas exhibited increased neovascularization and vessel dropout, closely resembling Nf1+/- animals
